Large Data Management \- SET01 

![][image1]![][image2]

**Large Data Management *\- Exam Paper*** 

***Duration: 60 minutes | Marks: 15*** 

***Question*****:**   
The system e-commerce have function Order with example document as below: { 

"orderid": 1,   
"products": \[   
{   
"product\_id": "quanau",   
"product\_name": "quan au",   
"size": "XL",   
"price": 10,   
"quantity": 1   
},   
{   
"product\_id": "somi",   
"product\_name": "ao so mi",   
"size": "XL",   
"price": 10.5,   
"quantity": 2   
}   
\],   
"total\_amount":31,   
"delivery\_address":"Hanoi"   
}   
Information database:   
Database name: eShop   
Document name: OrderCollection   
Using knowledge in subject Large Data Management to develop this system. 1\. Connection to mongodb by python or c\# or the Java language. 

2\. Insert many documents into OrderCollection same above example.   
3\. Edit delivery\_address by orderid.   
4\. Remove an order.   
5\. Read all order in OrderCollection as below table: 

| No  | Product name  | Price  | Quantity  | Total |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |

1 quan au 10 1 10 2 ao so mi 10.5 2 21 

6\. Calculate total amount   
7\. Count total product\_id equal “somi” and show to screen. 

Marking Schema: 

Large Data Management – Set01 Practical Paper1/2  
Large Data Management \- SET01 

| Question  | Mark |
| :---- | :---- |
| Question 1 Connection to database  | **3** |
| Question 2 Insert orders  | **3** |
| Question 3 Edit delivery\_address  | **3** |
| Question 4 Remove an order  | **2** |
| Question 5 Read all order  | **2** |
| Question 6 Calculate total amount  | **1** |

Question 7 Count total product\_id **1** 

**Total 15** 

Large Data Management – Set01 Practical Paper2/2
